mandatory_claims: UniT achieves state-of-the-art data efficiency and robust out-of-distribution generalization
UniT aligns cross-embodiment dynamics via unified tokens as conditions
UniT induces a highly aligned cross-embodiment representation
required_visuals: t-SNE visualization of human and humanoid features
Comparison of UniT with alternative methods
likely_failures: Overemphasis on technical details without practical applications
Lack of clear explanation of UniT's advantages over existing methods
Insufficient discussion of potential limitations and falsification experiments
preventive_checks: Verify that the introduction clearly explains the problem and UniT's solution
Check that the architecture section provides a concise and easy-to-understand overview of UniT
Ensure that the policy learning and world modeling sections provide concrete examples and results
Review the 'What would falsify this' section for a clear and realistic experiment
backup_remedies: Add a section on potential applications and future work
Include a comparison with other state-of-the-art methods
Provide additional visualizations or diagrams to illustrate UniT's architecture and results
reviewer_focus: Clarity and concision of the introduction and architecture sections
Effectiveness of the policy learning and world modeling sections in demonstrating UniT's advantages
Realism and feasibility of the 'What would falsify this' section
